title: BattlePack
description: A kit-PVP data pack, with unique kits and a fully destructible-map.
body:
![BattlePack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80c096fb9652a57e25b9cc5eee7a26c469848487.png)

BattlePack is a datapack that creates a minigame style PVP experience, with 15 unique characters to choose from, all with their own abilities and ultimates. It also uses a fully destructible map that regenerates after every round.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M8SjeShUsLA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Every round begins in the hub, which features basic game controls and the ability to spectate games. Character selection is menu-based, using the [G] key (Quick Actions keybind). In this menu, operators may also start, end, and debug games. 

Please also download the **necessary resource pack**.

### **Character Info:**

<details>
<summary>Ampere</summary>

Ampere uses lightning-based powers, both in punches and at a range.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Assassin</summary>

Assassin thrives on hit-and-run tactics, while also having ranged options and bombs.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Avian</summary>

Avian soars through the skies for a limited time, dropping webs and sometimes players; while still having the option to attack at close ranges.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Brawler</summary>

Brawler punches opponents, while regenerating at fast speeds.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Cyberrunner</summary>

Cyberrunner quickly moves around the map, having both melee and ranged attack options. Has to be careful not to go into psychosis when healing.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Elven Mage</summary>

Elven Mage fires spells (costing mana) from their staff, based on the page of their grimoire.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Frostburn</summary>

Frostburn is a ranged character has 3 forms: Flame, Frost, and Frostburn; with each coming after a death.

Flame Form: Dash, launch fireballs, and set enemies on fire.

Frost Form: Build up Permafrost on enemies, heal more easily, and freeze other players.

Frostburn Form: Combine abilites from both the Flame and Frost forms.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Gambler</summary>

Gambler rolls the dice on their kit; able to get buffs, tools, and possibly even the Jackpot.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Jumper</summary>

Jumper uses the mace to crush their enemies from above, while also having a few other weapons.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Reaper</summary>

Reaper steals health from other players, able to increase their max HP to an unlimited amount. However, Reaper's max HP is also always slowly draining. More abilites come at higher HP.
  
</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Shogun</summary>

Shogun is the master of the sword, able to release a flurry of slashes, and even able to parry incoming attacks.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Sonar</summary>

Sonar is mostly blind, but compensates by having increased physical capabilites, and constant player tracking. Their staff also allows for combos on successive hits.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Trübelkun</summary>

Trübelkun fires invisble slashes from up close and at range, slowly building up a powerful fireball.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Warrior</summary>

Warrior is a very tanky character, and able to store attacks into power via their shield.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Wolfcaller</summary>

Wolfcaller summons wolves to their aid, while also wielding a powerful bow and trident. 

</details>

### Admin Controls:
Access by using **/function battle:admin/...**

Hub Controls: allows the game to be controlled by non-operators in the hub

Load Messages: displays messages every time the game loads.

### Notes:

When loading world, please allow up to 20 seconds to pass for all features to fully load.

**For server owners:** 

Make sure command blocks are enabled in server.properties
```
enable-command-block=true
```
If you encounter "You cannot trigger this objective yet," then Reset; either using the menu or in-hub controls.

**Credits**

- Creative Director & Sound Design: [Hoshino Applo](https://applohoshino.carrd.co/)
- Texture Artist & Map Design: IrisAce

- Special Thanks: GalSergey, HeDeAn, Quimoth, Kanokarob, Misode
